conditions: Closest 4 ft piling on right is clear with texture. The mid/right ~11 ft piling is only barely discernible as a hazy silhouette, and farther pilings are extremely faint. Conditions match the case where only the 11 ft piling is really visible beyond the nearest, corresponding to about 10 ft visibility.

Only the nearest 4 ft piling on the right edge is clearly visible; the 11 ft piling is not discernible and the background quickly fades into uniform green water with no other pilings or bottom visible. This corresponds to very poor conditions where only the closest structure is seen clearly.

Only the nearest piling edge is partially visible at the far right; all more distant pilings are completely obscured in uniform blue water with no discernible silhouettes, indicating very poor visibility under 5 ft.

Closest 4 ft piling at right edge is clear with good texture. The 11 ft piling to its left is visible but quite hazy, lacking clear detail. The 14 ft and 30 ft pilings are not distinctly visible as separate structures; they blend into the background haze. This corresponds to conditions where only the 11 ft piling is meaningfully visible.

Closest 4ft piling on right is clear with good texture. The 11ft piling is only barely hinted as a very faint vertical shadow and not clearly distinguishable. No clear view of 14ft or 30ft pilings. This corresponds to conditions where only the closest piling is clearly visible.
